Bash(python -c "
import pdfplumber, sys
with pdfplumber.open\(r'C:/Users/parra/OneDrive/Documents/Backend-PI3/PI3-Backend/GALPyra_Requerimientos_Completo.pdf'\) as pdf:
    total = len\(pdf.pages\)
    sys.stderr.write\(f'Total paginas: {total}\\n'\)
    for i, page in enumerate\(pdf.pages\):
        text = page.extract_text\(\)
        if text:
            encoded = text.encode\('ascii', 'replace'\).decode\('ascii'\)
            print\(f'--- PAGINA {i+1} ---'\)
            print\(encoded\)
" 2>&1)
